title: astracantha adscendens
intro: Astracantha adscendens, also known as the spiny broom or broom thistle, is a spiny, thistle-like plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Astracantha adscendens is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
